templates.structure: Six sentences. Terse one-line opener, then a long approach-and-description sentence, an extended anatomical catalogue, a chaotic multi-clause clash, and a catastrophic fall. Rhythm accelerates from slow descriptive dread into rapid sequential violence.
rhetorical-dna: Clipped opening sentence breaks the preceding paragraph's ornament and resets tempo
Anatomy rendered through compounding similes, each detail layered without pause, denying the reader breath
Creature/foe described through composite analogies rather than a single fixed image
Violence delivered in rapid semicolon-joined independent clauses: strike, wound, charge, fall
The catastrophic fall elongated by spatial markers stretching the sentence to match the distance
templates.respecification-seed: A monster/foe closes on an individual or party in a confined space, scattering them.

templates.structure: Twelve-plus sentences of relentless compounding violence. Opens with counter-attack, ratchets through escalating wounds and broken weapons, climaxes with bare-handed killing, then slowly unwinds through the creature/foe's death spasms and final rest. Polysyndeton piles action upon action without relief until the final still image.
rhetorical-dna: Polysyndetic chains create breathless momentum, conjunctions refusing to let the reader pause
Sensory revulsion as combat texture: stench, blood, viscera rendered with the same formal diction as heroic action
Weapon loss as structural pivot, forcing shift from armed combat to visceral grappling
Similes shift register as the fight degrades: martial comparisons give way to domestic and natural ones (Example: heart sliced like a lemon, beast curled like a caterpillar)
Final sentences slow and flatten into a still-life after sustained frenzy, tension bleeding out through progressively shorter closing clauses
templates.respecification-seed: A lone fighter, weapon broken, kills a monster/foe by hand and endures its collapse.

templates.structure: Four sentences. Opens with a tableau of the fallen figure, pivots to the rescuer's prior act, returns to the grim image, then closes with tending and vigilance.
rhetorical-dna: Inverted syntax gives archaic, saga-like cadence
Passive, death-still figure contrasted with the active hands of the lesser companion
Visceral body-horror detail bracketed by gentleness
Final clause shifts from urgency to patient watchfulness, letting tension drain
templates.respecification-seed: A lesser companion tends a fallen warrior after a beast/foe-slaying.

templates.structure: Seven sentences building from prayer through divine commentary, into a long procedural descent sequence, finishing with a quiet time-stamp. Opens short, swells through extended compound sentences, then contracts to a flat declarative close.
rhetorical-dna: Narrator's ironic theological aside layered over genuine piety
Extended participial chains mimic physical labor
Repeated concessive constructions sustain a tone of hard-won perseverance
Archaic diction and syntax throughout, lending ceremonial weight to physical struggle
Final flat time-marker punctures the elevated register, grounding the scene
templates.respecification-seed: A humble figure performs a perilous traversal of deadly terrain, aided by desperate prayer and raw skill.
